aeo_readiness.summary: SunDollar A/C & Heat has a strong foundation for local visibility but lacks critical elements for AI model recognition and citation, such as structured data and conversational content.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include How-To guides and problem-solution articles.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up or claimed.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC repair and installation in Frisco, TX.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through detailed service explanations and customer testimonials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, SunDollar misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The current website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely to be cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer you wait, the more market share you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for SunDollar A/C & Heat
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
